wine_retailers.name: Cave Saint-Patrice
wine_retailers.description: Independent wine merchant in Avignon's city centre specialising in Southern Rhone Valley producers. Deep Chateauneuf-du-Pape selection with back vintages from Beaucastel, Rayas and Vieux Telegraphe alongside accessible entry-level Cotes du Rhone.
wine_retailers.specialty: Southern Rhone Valley, Chateauneuf-du-Pape back vintages

wine_retailers.name: Caves du Chapitre
wine_retailers.address: 16 rue de la Republique, 84000 Avignon, France
wine_retailers.description: Long-established Avignon wine merchant with over 800 references. Strong Rhone Valley offering from appellation wines to prestige vintages; staff trained through Inter Rhone certification programme.
wine_retailers.specialty: Full Rhone Valley range, prestige Hermitage and Cote-Rotie

wine_retailers.name: Cave de Tain Shop
wine_retailers.description: The cooperative's retail shop open to the public with the full Cave de Tain range. Competitive direct pricing on Crozes-Hermitage and Hermitage; the only retail point for the limited Nobles Rives prestige cuvees without joining the mailing list.

wine_retailers.name: Gigondas La Cave Shop
wine_retailers.description: The Gigondas cooperative shop stocking wines from 40+ local producers under one roof. Only place in the appellation to do a comparative tasting across the full village range before buying by the case.
wine_retailers.specialty: Gigondas AOC from independent growers, Vacqueyras

wine_retailers.name: Cave Saint-Vincent
wine_retailers.address: 6 rue de la Martiniere, 69001 Lyon, France
wine_retailers.description: One of Lyon's premier wine merchants with a comprehensive Northern Rhone range. Specialist in Cote-Rotie, Condrieu and Saint-Joseph with a dedicated back-vintage section and producer newsletters.
wine_retailers.specialty: Northern Rhone Valley, Cote-Rotie and Condrieu specialists

wine_retailers.name: Les Celliers des Princes
wine_retailers.description: The Chateauneuf-du-Pape cooperative wine shop in the village, offering estate wines at direct-from-producer pricing. Largest volume wine shop within the appellation; tastings of all cooperative bottlings available on request.
wine_retailers.specialty: Chateauneuf-du-Pape cooperative range, Cotes du Rhone

wine_retailers.name: Chapoutier Wine Shop Tain
wine_retailers.address: 18 avenue du Docteur Paul Durand, 26600 Tain-l'Hermitage, France
wine_retailers.description: Chapoutier's flagship retail outlet at their Tain-l'Hermitage headquarters. Full range of estate wines from Crozes-Hermitage through Ermitage single-parcels; also stocks Chapoutier's Australian and Portuguese ranges.
wine_retailers.specialty: Chapoutier Hermitage and Ermitage single-parcels, international Chapoutier ranges

verified.address_quoted: 18 avenue du Docteur Paul Durand, 26600 Tain-l'Hermitage

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca du Rhone
wine_retailers.address: 7 rue des Vieux Moulins, 84100 Orange, France
wine_retailers.description: Bottle shop and tasting bar in Orange with a focus on small-grower Cotes du Rhone Villages and the surrounding named villages. Owner Emmanuel Ayme sources producer-direct with an emphasis on organic certification.
wine_retailers.specialty: Cotes du Rhone Villages, Massif d'Uchaux, Roaix-Seguret producers

wine_retailers.name: Vins et Terroirs Valence
wine_retailers.description: Valence bottle shop specialising in Northern Rhone estate wines with a focus on producer relationships across Cornas, Saint-Peray and Crozes-Hermitage. Regular Saturday grower appearances and monthly vertical tasting events.
wine_retailers.specialty: Northern Rhone, Cornas, Saint-Peray, Crozes-Hermitage growers

wine_retailers.name: Cave du Palais
wine_retailers.description: Premium independent wine merchant inside Avignon's walls with a fine-wine cellar covering Chateauneuf-du-Pape verticals, Hermitage and Northern Rhone rarities. Climate-controlled storage for back vintages.
wine_retailers.specialty: Premium Chateauneuf-du-Pape, Hermitage back vintages, Northern Rhone rarities
